working: readNotesDir: parses position, sorts positioned asc then unpositioned by updated desc
POST /notes/reorder: swaps adjacent notes, lazily assigns positions to all on first reorder
POST /notes: new notes get position = notes.length
PATCH /notes: preserves existing position when saving content or renaming
syncAppleNotesToObsidian: preserves existing position when re-syncing
notes: Positions are lazily assigned — unpositioned notes sort by mtime until first reorder. First ▲/▼ click assigns positions to all notes in the current sorted order.
